title: Japan Real Estate Transaction Prices (MLIT Official)
description: Fetch actual real estate transaction and contract prices from Japan's official MLIT Real Estate Information Library. No API key needed — pick a year and area and run. The first 50 records of every run are free.

year.title: Year
year.description: Transaction year (2005 or later; contract prices start in 2021).

quarter.title: Quarter (optional)
quarter.description: 1-4. Leave empty to fetch the whole year.

prefectures.title: Prefectures
prefectures.description: English name (Tokyo), Japanese name (東京都), or 2-digit code (13). Up to 12 prefecture-year combinations per run.

cities.title: Cities (optional)
cities.description: City/ward name (Chiyoda, 千代田区) or 5-digit city code (13101). Names are resolved within the specified prefectures.

station.title: Station code (optional)
station.description: 6-digit station group code from MLIT's National Land Numerical Information (N02_005g). v1 accepts codes only, not station names.

price_category.title: Price category
price_category.description: transaction = survey-based transaction prices (from 2005), closed = REINS-derived contract prices (from 2021), both = everything.

property_types.title: Property types (optional)
property_types.description: Keep only records whose property type contains one of these terms (case-insensitive), e.g. "Condominium", "Residential Land", "Forest".

include_aggregates.title: Include municipality × quarter aggregates
include_aggregates.description: Also output median price / median unit price / count per municipality and quarter, computed from the records fetched in this run. Free of charge.
